description: Segel — confidential sealed-bid OTC desk on Stellar. Two BN254 Groth16 ZK circuits (bidValidity, auctionResult) verified on-chain by Soroban; an otc desk contract with USDC-denominated SAC escrow custody (project-issued mock asset, not Circle's USDC), Vickrey settlement, and per-RFQ nullifiers.

token.note: testnet USDC-denominated SAC. Issuer is a PROJECT-CONTROLLED mock (GC7SWGHR…, 1 holder), NOT Circle's canonical testnet USDC (GBBD47IF…). Custody mechanics are real SAC transfers: each bidder's good-faith escrow (= band_max) is custodied here, winner pays clearing to maker, losers refunded.

bidValidity.proves: commit binding + in-band range + proof-of-funds + ASP allow-list membership + fresh nullifier

auctionResult.proves: all commitments bind + winner = argmax + clearingPrice = second-highest (Vickrey), all in-circuit; losing bids never output
auctionResult.tamperedResult: rejected on-chain (Error(Contract, #0) / InvalidProof) when the clearing-price public input is flipped

oracleIntegration.usage: mark_price(symbol) does a real cross-contract lastprice() read — live market mark (USD, 14 decimals) for XLM/USDC etc.; lets makers/takers sanity-check a sealed auction vs the market and is the basis for a future oracle-derived maker reserve

security.binding: the contract builds every verifier public-input vector itself from typed values it controls (authenticated bidder, RFQ band, recorded commitments) — a proof cannot be reused with different inputs
security.proofOfFunds: commit_bid pins availBal = band_max (the escrow) and then transfers that escrow from the bidder; the transfer must succeed, so the bidder provably holds >= band_max >= bid (the hidden bid is bound to escrowed funds)
security.vickreyBinding: settle builds the auction public inputs from the RECORDED commitments (padded to N=8 with Poseidon(0,0,0)), so the proof is over exactly the on-chain sealed set
security.nullifier: one bid per identity per RFQ (Sybil resistance), identity hidden
security.adminControls: admin-gated set_verifiers (rotate a buggy verifier — previously immutable), set_admin (hand over the role), set_oracle (swap the price feed), and upgrade (in-place WASM upgrade, keeps the contract id); instance-storage TTL is extended on every state change so config cannot expire

e2eLive.description: Full sealed-bid OTC flow verified live on testnet (scripts/e2e-testnet.mjs): post RFQ -> 3 sealed bids with real bidValidity proofs -> Vickrey settle. Winner bid 4900, clearing price 4200 (second-highest); losing bids never revealed on-chain.

circuits.trustedSetup: Powers-of-Tau 2^14 (phase-1 generated locally for the hackathon build; production wants the Hermez perpetual ceremony + multi-party phase-2)
